\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4546 introduces Angular Velocity Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\Omega}_{n} = \sum_{a} \left( \mathcal{P} \cdot \psi_{n}(\mathbf{r}_a) \right) \otimes \exp\left( -\int \Sigma_{tot}(\ManifoldL) \, dz \right) \end{equation}
